data.title: South Korean man arrested for allegedly laundering $50M in crypto to gold with call center gang in Thailand.
data.description: Authorities in Thailand have apprehended a male individual from South Korea who stands accused of aiding a criminal call center group in laundering more than $50 million in cryptocurrency by converting it into gold.

data.title: AVAX price aims for $32 breakout after 13% rally, with $25.99 resistance as key level. Bullish indicators signal August surge.
data.description: A prediction for AVAX's price points towards a possible target of $32, backed by technical indicators turning bullish after a significant 13.18% surge in a day. The key resistance level at $25.99 is seen as crucial for a breakout scenario.

data.title: Polkadot (DOT) expected to reach $13.50-19.45 by Q4 2025 with technical recovery. Bullish forecast predicts $19.45 by 2025 end.
data.description: The price prediction for DOT indicates a bullish trend aiming for a medium-term target of $13.50, with forecasts for Polkadot suggesting a potential increase to $19.45 by the end of 2025.

data.title: Industrial Steam Generation Outlook expected to reach 12,780.0 billion kg by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 4.5%.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of August 23, 2025, reports suggest that the worldwide forecast for Industrial Steam Generation is on an upward trajectory. Anticipated to increase from approximately 9,856.7 billion kg in 2024 to 12,780.0 billion kg by 2030, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.5%. This projection signifies a significant expansion in steam generation within industrial sectors, pointing towards continued growth and development throughout the forecast period.

data.title: Polygon aims for $1.70-$2.10 breakout by Aug 2025, projecting 300-400% growth from $0.33-$0.35 support level.
data.description: The forecast for MATIC indicates a possible increase of 300-400%, reaching a range of $1.70-$2.10 by the conclusion of August 2025. This positive potential is seen amidst ongoing bearish trends, particularly close to the crucial support levels of $0.33-$0.35.

data.title: DOGE aiming for $0.265 breakout after testing critical level at $0.225, buoyed by bullish indicators amid analyst forecasts.
data.description: The current forecast for DOGE indicates a potential surge to $0.265 if the resistance level at $0.225 is surpassed. Technical indicators are backing the bullish momentum, although analysts' predictions are varied.

data.title: SOL price could reach $220-230 in 30 days due to strong bullish momentum, with MACD at 1.1190 and key resistance breakout.
data.description: The forecast for SOL's price suggests a target range of $220 to $230 within the next month, based on strong bullish momentum indicated by technical analysis. The MACD histogram reads at 1.1190, supporting this upward trend, as the price has surpassed significant resistance levels.

data.title: Cardano aims for $1.13 with 23% upside potential, supported by breakout above $0.95 resistance. Bullish momentum continues.
data.description: Analysts are optimistic about Cardano (ADA) as it exhibits a bullish trend, with a target of $1.13 by mid-September. Technical indicators suggest a potential breakout above the $0.95 resistance level, paving the way for substantial gains.

data.title: XRP may retest $2.80 before breakout to $3.20 in September 2025, as per Fibonacci levels and momentum indicators.
data.description: Based on analysis using Fibonacci levels and momentum indicators, a price prediction for XRP suggests a retest of the $2.80 support level within the next 7 days. This retest may be followed by a potential rally towards $3.20 by mid-September.

data.title: BNB price may hit $1,000 in 30 days as technical momentum suggests. Current price: $893, and resistance is near.
data.description: The BNB price is currently at $893, hovering near resistance levels, and is predicted to reach $1,000 with a bullish momentum. Technical analysis suggests further upward potential in the future.

data.title: ETH's price may hit $5,150 by Sept 2025, aiming for a 52-week high breakout, with current support at $4,200 and bullish momentum building.
data.description: According to recent technical analysis, Ethereum is expected to reach a price target of $5,150 within the next 2 to 3 weeks. There is a strong bullish momentum evident above the $4,200 support level, supported by significant institutional investments flowing into the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Kaolin market to reach $8.27 billion by 2030 - MarketsandMarkets™ report. Various types & end-use industries covered.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on August 23, 2025, a study was released on the Kaolin Market. The research categorized Kaolin into two types - Synthetic and Natural - and looked at various processes involved such as Water-washed, Airfloat, Calcined, Delaminated, Surface-modified, and Unprocessed. This market analysis also explored the End-use Industries of Kaolin including Paper, Ceramics & Sanitaryware, Fiberglass, Paints & Coatings, and Rubber. The report did not disclose specific data but it underscores the significance of Kaolin across industries.

data.title: Bitcoin's price could reach $124,500 with key support at $112,000 holding through September, technical analysis shows.
data.description: The current Bitcoin price prediction indicates a near-term target of $124,500 if the cryptocurrency can uphold its support level at $112,000. Technical analysis suggests a potential breakout window within the next 7 to 14 days.

data.title: Trailblazer Lisa Cook, first Black woman on Fed board, targeted by Trump. She challenges norms in a white male-dominated field.
data.description: Ms. Cook, the initial African American woman to hold a position on the Federal Reserve board, has established herself as a trailblazer in an industry primarily led by white males.

data.title: Military presence leads to decrease in restaurant business in Washington.
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that there has been a 10% increase in confirmed cases of COVID-19 in the past week, bringing the total number of cases to 100,000. The number of deaths related to the virus has also risen by 5%, reaching a total of 2,000. Additionally, there has been a significant surge in the number of hospitalizations, with a 15% increase noted. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and restrictions to curb the spread of the virus.

data.title: Donald Trump, as a new activist investor, demands govt stakes in US firms & a share of revenue, reminiscent of state-managed capitalism.
data.description: The president has called for the government to acquire stakes in American companies and receive a portion of their profits. This move has drawn comparisons to state-controlled capitalism practiced in various global regions.

data.title: All-female hacker house in SF's Glen Park - FoundHer House - offers support to residents as they build start-ups.
data.description: Located in San Francisco's Glen Park neighborhood, FoundHer House stands out as a unique all-female hacker house. Here, residents are fostering a supportive environment to develop their start-ups.

data.title: Trump's proposed tariffs may impact numerous common U.S. medications, potentially affecting millions of consumers.
data.description: The proposed pharmaceutical tariffs by President Trump could impact numerous widely used drugs in the American market.

data.title: Changes to student loan repayment plans are impacting federal loans. Stay informed on how to repay loans and avoid tax issues.
data.description: Legal disputes and new laws have significantly impacted federal student loans. It is crucial to understand key information for repayment and navigating potential tax implications. Stay informed to effectively manage your loans.
